# AiM Systems - Ankit Panicker

AiM Systems is a technology consultancy led by Ankit Panicker, a System Architect specializing in Production AI Infrastructure and End-to-End (E2E) B2B Product Delivery.

## Core Engagement Offerings
- **Fixed-Price E2E B2B Product Delivery**: GBP 85,000 for a 3-month timeline, split into 3 clear milestones with weekly progress reports. All aspects handled solo: architecture, backend, frontend, infrastructure, CI/CD, monitoring, and staging deployment.
- **Outside IR35 Engagement**: Operates through a UK Ltd company with milestone-gated payments, zero status meetings, and full UK/EU remote overlap.

## Core Products & White-Label Systems
- **APEX Voice Platform**: Multi-tenant, real-time, speech-to-speech voice AI. Inbound/outbound call handling, super admin dashboard, self-serve onboarding, Stripe billing, webhook API, and 5-layer fallbacks.
- **APEX Campaign Engine**: Automated bulk dialling with CSV uploads, retry pacing, and parallel WhatsApp business message notifications.
- **APEX Shortz Infra**: Self-healing GPU media pipeline on consumer hardware. Sub-cent video generation with local ComfyUI, whisper-large, and auto-recovery loops.
- **APEX HMS Offline Suite**: Fully offline hospital management system running local AI on NUC hardware. Zero cloud dependencies.
- **APEX Conversational AI**: Offline voice assistant with 5-signal voice activity detection (VAD), local LLM inference, and multi-room audio sync.
- **APEX Workflow Engine**: Visual no-code canvas builder to orchestrate AI communication sequences and APIs.

## White-Label Licensing Tiers
- **Startup**: GBP 100,000 (For companies under 50 staff)
- **Mid-Market**: GBP 120,000 (For companies with 50-200 staff)
- **Enterprise**: Custom Pricing (For companies with 200+ staff)
- **Telco / BPO**: Custom Pricing (For Resellers)
- **Annual Maintenance & Support**: GBP 20,000 / year (Mandatory; covers bug fixes, uptime monitoring, priority incident response, and updates)
